ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: AzureDevops Project ID or project name
ast.target: AzureDevops 项目 ID 或项目名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: AzureDevops Team ID or team name
ast.target: AzureDevops 团队 ID 或团队名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A comma-separated list of usernames you want the tasks of. Simply put your username if you only need your own.
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的用户名列表，您希望获取其任务。如果您只需要自己的任务，只需输入您的用户名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your AzureDevops PAT with full access
ast.target: 您的具有完全访问权限的 AzureDevops PAT

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Line-separated list of column key names from your team sprint board to be used in Kanban board
ast.target: 以换行符分隔的列键名列表，来自您的团队冲刺板，用于看板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your GitLab instance hostname (e.g. gitlab.com or gitlab.yourcompany.com)
ast.target: 您的 GitLab 实例主机名（例如 gitlab.com 或 gitlab.yourcompany.com）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A GitLab Personal Access Token with read_api scope
ast.target: 一个具有 read_api 范围的 GitLab 个人访问令牌

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A comma-separated list of GitLab usernames you want tasks for. Put your username if you only need your own.
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的 GitLab 用户名列表，您希望获取其任务。如果您只需要自己的任务，请输入您的用户名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Milestones: groups issues by active milestone (sprints). Board: shows all project issues. User: fetches all assigned issues across all projects into date-based folders (Year/Quarter/Month).
ast.target: 里程碑：按活动里程碑（冲刺）对问题进行分组。看板：显示所有项目问题。用户：将所有项目中分配的任务获取到基于日期的文件夹（年/季/月）中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The numeric project ID or URL-encoded path (e.g. 12345 or mygroup%2Fmyproject). Found on the project homepage.
ast.target: 数字项目 ID 或 URL 编码路径（例如 12345 或 mygroup%2Fmyproject）。可在项目主页找到。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The ID of your GitLab issue board (optional). If set, column names are fetched automatically from the board. Found in the board URL.
ast.target: 您的 GitLab 问题看板 ID（可选）。如果设置，列名将自动从看板获取。可在看板 URL 中找到。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only pull issues that are not closed

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Uses the milestone's title for the folder name instead of its numeric ID
ast.target: 使用里程碑的标题作为文件夹名称，而不是其数字 ID

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of column names for the Kanban board. Must include "Open" and "Closed". Middle columns should match your GitLab labels. (Only used when Board ID is not set.)
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的看板列名列表。必须包含“Open”和“Closed”。中间列应与您的 GitLab 标签匹配。（仅在未设置看板 ID 时使用。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The base URL of your Jira server or {ip:port}
ast.target: 您的 Jira 服务器的基础 URL 或 {ip:port}

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the mode of authorization to be used
ast.target: 设置要使用的授权模式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The API token generated with your account
ast.target: 使用您的帐户生成的 API 令牌

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The ID of your Scrum board (the number in the URL when viewing scrum board in browser)
ast.target: 您的 Scrum 看板 ID（在浏览器中查看 Scrum 看板时 URL 中的数字）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the mode corresponding to how you use Jira
ast.target: 设置与您使用 Jira 的方式相对应的模式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Uses the Sprint's human assigned name
ast.target: 使用冲刺的人工分配名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable to prevent creation of issues from the backlog
ast.target: 启用以防止从待办事项创建问题

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The type of TFS you use.
ast.target: 您使用的 TFS 类型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pulls tasks of entire team and shows usernames in generated Kanban board. (ignores username list)
ast.target: 拉取整个团队的任务并在生成的看板中显示用户名。（忽略用户名列表）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The relative path to the parent folder in which to create/update Kanban boards
ast.target: 用于创建/更新看板的父文件夹的相对路径

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the inital content for each new task note. Available variables: {{TASK_ID}}, {{TASK_TITLE}}, {{TASK_TYPE}}, {{TASK_STATE}}, {{TASK_ASSIGNEDTO}}, {{TASK_LINK}}, {{TASK_DESCRIPTION}} Azure/GitLab: {{TASK_DUEDATE}} {{TASK_TAGS}} Azure only: {{TASK_CRITERIA}} {{TASK_TESTS}}
ast.target: 设置每个新任务笔记的初始内容。可用变量：{{TASK_ID}}, {{TASK_TITLE}}, {{TASK_TYPE}}, {{TASK_STATE}}, {{TASK_ASSIGNEDTO}}, {{TASK_LINK}}, {{TASK_DESCRIPTION}} Azure/GitLab: {{TASK_DUEDATE}} {{TASK_TAGS}} 仅限 Azure: {{TASK_CRITERIA}} {{TASK_TESTS}}

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the format of the file name for each task note. Available variables: {{TASK_ID}}, {{TASK_NAME}}, {{TASK_TYPE}}, {{TASK_STATE}}, {{TASK_ASSIGNEDTO}}
ast.target: 设置每个任务笔记的文件名格式。可用变量：{{TASK_ID}}, {{TASK_NAME}}, {{TASK_TYPE}}, {{TASK_STATE}}, {{TASK_ASSIGNEDTO}}

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Interval (in minutes) to periodically update the kanban board and notes. Set to 0 for only manual updating. You'll need to restart Obsidian for this to take effect. Note: when an update occurs it will close the kanban board if it is open thus a number over 10 mins is recommended.
ast.target: 定期更新看板和笔记的时间间隔（以分钟为单位）。设置为 0 表示仅手动更新。您需要重启 Obsidian 才能使此设置生效。注意：更新发生时，如果看板是打开的，它将被关闭，因此建议设置超过 10 分钟的数字。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Should a Kanban board be generated for the current sprint (requires the Kanban board plugin in addition to this one)
ast.target: 是否应为当前冲刺生成看板（除了此插件外，还需要看板插件）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用里程碑名称（而非 ID）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用冲刺名称（而非 ID）

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入以逗号分隔的列表

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入项目 ID 或路径

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 打开,进行中,审核,已关闭

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入 Jira 基础 URL

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Initial content in raw markdown format
ast.target: 原始 Markdown 格式的初始内容

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error occured, see console logs for details. (ctrl+shift+i) to open
ast.target: 发生错误，详情请查看控制台日志。按 (ctrl+shift+i) 打开
